chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 1067 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.6391/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For hearing of bail application 06.11.2025 Mr. Pervaiz Ali Jatoi, Advocate along with applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Office objections for the time being are overruled on account of the bail application being concluded through this order. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Applicant / accused Faisal Memon S/o Muhammad Iqbal seeks protective bail in Crime No.11/2024, registered at Police Station Airport, Sukkur, under Sections 420, 489-F, 506/2, 34, PPC. Learned Counsel for the applicant contends that the present applicant acquired bail before arrest, which was also confirmed, and proceeded with the trial; however, he was told that compromise has been effected, whereas, being unaware that his case was put to dormant file now the case has been brought up and NBW has been issued against the applicant. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail is granted to the applicant / accused for a period of five days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees thirty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of the NBW shall stand suspended for the period of five days. Applicant / accused shall surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have any effect after expiry of five days or when the applicant surrenders before the trial court, whichever occurs earlier.

Applicant / accused shall surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have any effect after expiry of five days or when the applicant surrenders before the trial court, whichever occurs earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
